    MappingNode
    Represents a map.
    Node
    Base class for all nodes.
    NodeTuple
    Stores one key value pair used in a map.
  • Classes in org.yaml.snakeyaml.nodes used by org.yaml.snakeyaml.constructor 
    Class Description
    CollectionNode
    Base class for the two collection types mapping and collection.
    MappingNode
    Represents a map.
    Node
    Base class for all nodes.
    NodeId
    Enum for the basic YAML types: scalar, sequence, mapping or anchor.
    ScalarNode
    Represents a scalar node.
    SequenceNode
    Represents a sequence.
    Tag
